# Wikijs Editor

## Overview

gSage AI ‚Äî Wiki.js page editor tool.

## Tool

| Tool | Summary | Permissions | Requires approval | Core |
| --- | --- | --- | :---: | :---: |
| `wikijs_editor` | Browse, read, search, create, edit, and delete Wiki.js Markdown pages (wiki, knowledge base, wikijs). Use for any wiki or documentation operation. | `wiki:read`, `wiki:write` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |

## Configuration

> The JSON below goes into the **configtool model** in the web UI (per organisation; can also be scoped to a department).

> **Multiple profiles supported** ‚Äî you may create more than one config row per organisation, each with a distinct `profile_id`. The agent picks one via the `config_profile` parameter at call time. State, rate limits and circuit-breaker counters are isolated per profile.

> **Sensitive fields** (api keys / passwords / tokens) are *omitted* from the JSON below ‚Äî set them via environment variables (see the _Environment variables_ table) or directly in the encrypted DB row from the web UI.

### Empty configtool template (required fields only)

```json
{}
```

### Example configtool model

```json
{
  "api_token": "",
  "locale": "",
  "url": "",
  "writable_path": ""
}
```

### Field reference

| Field | Type | Required | Sensitive | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- |
| `api_token` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | `""` | Bearer token for the Wiki.js GraphQL API. Generate in Administration > API Access. Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__API_TOKEN env var. |
| `locale` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | Default Wiki.js locale for page lookups and creation (e.g. 'en', 'pt'). Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__LOCALE env var. |
| `url` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | Wiki.js base URL (e.g. http://wikijs:3000). Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__URL env var. |
| `writable_path` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | `""` | Path prefix that the tool is allowed to write to (e.g. 'gsage/'). Pages outside this prefix are read-only. Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__WRITABLE_PATH env var. |

## Environment variables

The variables below are derived automatically from each tool's `config_schema`. Set them in your `.env` (or via your secrets backend) to seed defaults for every organisation. **Per-org DB config takes precedence over env vars.**

| Variable | Maps to field | Type | Default | Sensitive | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
| `TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__API_TOKEN` | `api_token` | `string` | ‚Äî | ‚úì | Bearer token for the Wiki.js GraphQL API. Generate in Administration > API Access. Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__API_TOKEN env var. |
| `TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__LOCALE` | `locale` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Default Wiki.js locale for page lookups and creation (e.g. 'en', 'pt'). Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__LOCALE env var. |
| `TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__URL` | `url` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Wiki.js base URL (e.g. http://wikijs:3000). Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__URL env var. |
| `TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__WRITABLE_PATH` | `writable_path` | `string` | `""` | ‚Äî | Path prefix that the tool is allowed to write to (e.g. 'gsage/'). Pages outside this prefix are read-only. Overrides TOOL_WIKIJS_EDITOR__WRITABLE_PATH env var. |

## Operations

### `wikijs_editor`

- **`list_pages`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `path` | `string` | ‚Äî | Page path or folder prefix. For list_pages: folder prefix to browse (e.g. 'gsage'). For read_page/grep_page: full page path (e.g. 'gsage/overview'). For create_page: full path for the new page. For edit_page: used to locate the page when page_id is unknown. |

- **`search_pages`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `query` | `string` | ‚Äî | Search term for search_pages. Wiki.js performs full-text search across all page titles and content. |

- **`read_page`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `path` | `string` | ‚Äî | Page path or folder prefix. For list_pages: folder prefix to browse (e.g. 'gsage'). For read_page/grep_page: full page path (e.g. 'gsage/overview'). For create_page: full path for the new page. For edit_page: used to locate the page when page_id is unknown. |
  | `page_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Wiki.js numeric page ID. Used by read_page, grep_page, and edit_page to identify the page. Preferred over 'path' when known ‚Äî avoids an extra lookup. |
  | `line_start` | `integer` | ‚Äî | First line to read or replace (1-based inclusive). Used by read_page (partial read) and edit_page (line range replacement). |
  | `line_end` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Last line to read or replace (1-based inclusive). Used by read_page (partial read) and edit_page (line range replacement). Must be >= line_start. |

- **`grep_page`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `path` | `string` | ‚Äî | Page path or folder prefix. For list_pages: folder prefix to browse (e.g. 'gsage'). For read_page/grep_page: full page path (e.g. 'gsage/overview'). For create_page: full path for the new page. For edit_page: used to locate the page when page_id is unknown. |
  | `page_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Wiki.js numeric page ID. Used by read_page, grep_page, and edit_page to identify the page. Preferred over 'path' when known ‚Äî avoids an extra lookup. |
  | `pattern` | `string` | ‚Äî | Python regex pattern to search within the page content for grep_page. Case-insensitive. Returns up to 50 matching lines. |

- **`edit_page`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `path` | `string` | ‚Äî | Page path or folder prefix. For list_pages: folder prefix to browse (e.g. 'gsage'). For read_page/grep_page: full page path (e.g. 'gsage/overview'). For create_page: full path for the new page. For edit_page: used to locate the page when page_id is unknown. |
  | `page_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Wiki.js numeric page ID. Used by read_page, grep_page, and edit_page to identify the page. Preferred over 'path' when known ‚Äî avoids an extra lookup. |
  | `line_start` | `integer` | ‚Äî | First line to read or replace (1-based inclusive). Used by read_page (partial read) and edit_page (line range replacement). |
  | `line_end` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Last line to read or replace (1-based inclusive). Used by read_page (partial read) and edit_page (line range replacement). Must be >= line_start. |
  | `new_content` | `string` | ‚Äî | Replacement text for edit_page. Replaces the lines [line_start, line_end] (inclusive). May contain multiple lines separated by newline characters. |

- **`create_page`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `path` | `string` | ‚Äî | Page path or folder prefix. For list_pages: folder prefix to browse (e.g. 'gsage'). For read_page/grep_page: full page path (e.g. 'gsage/overview'). For create_page: full path for the new page. For edit_page: used to locate the page when page_id is unknown. |
  | `title` | `string` | ‚Äî | Page title. Required for create_page. |
  | `content` | `string` | ‚Äî | Full Markdown content for the new page. Required for create_page. |
  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | Short description/summary for create_page (optional). |
  | `tags` | `array` | ‚Äî | List of tag strings for create_page (optional). |

- **`delete_page`** ‚Äî _(no description)_

  | Parameter | Type | Required | Description |
  | --- | --- | :---: | --- |
  | `path` | `string` | ‚Äî | Page path or folder prefix. For list_pages: folder prefix to browse (e.g. 'gsage'). For read_page/grep_page: full page path (e.g. 'gsage/overview'). For create_page: full path for the new page. For edit_page: used to locate the page when page_id is unknown. |
  | `page_id` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Wiki.js numeric page ID. Used by read_page, grep_page, and edit_page to identify the page. Preferred over 'path' when known ‚Äî avoids an extra lookup. |
  | `line_start` | `integer` | ‚Äî | First line to read or replace (1-based inclusive). Used by read_page (partial read) and edit_page (line range replacement). |
  | `line_end` | `integer` | ‚Äî | Last line to read or replace (1-based inclusive). Used by read_page (partial read) and edit_page (line range replacement). Must be >= line_start. |
  | `new_content` | `string` | ‚Äî | Replacement text for edit_page. Replaces the lines [line_start, line_end] (inclusive). May contain multiple lines separated by newline characters. |
  | `query` | `string` | ‚Äî | Search term for search_pages. Wiki.js performs full-text search across all page titles and content. |
  | `pattern` | `string` | ‚Äî | Python regex pattern to search within the page content for grep_page. Case-insensitive. Returns up to 50 matching lines. |
  | `title` | `string` | ‚Äî | Page title. Required for create_page. |
  | `content` | `string` | ‚Äî | Full Markdown content for the new page. Required for create_page. |
  | `description` | `string` | ‚Äî | Short description/summary for create_page (optional). |
  | `tags` | `array` | ‚Äî | List of tag strings for create_page (optional). |
